en: A scheduled meeting or arrangement to see someone, especially a doctor.
en_example: I have an appointment at two o'clock.

en: A person who greets and assists visitors or callers at an office or clinic.
en_example: The receptionist will help you when you call the doctor's office.
zh_example: 電話那頭的人，接待員，會幫助你。
ja: 受付係、レセプショニスト
ja_example: 電話の相手、受付の人が助けてくれます。

en: An abnormally high body temperature, usually indicating illness.
en_example: Maybe you have a fever if you feel hot.
ja_example: 熱があるかもしれませんね。

en: A device used to measure temperature, especially body temperature.
en_example: The nurse might check your temperature with a thermometer.
zh_example: 護士可能會量你的體溫。
ja_example: 看護師は体温を測るかもしれません。

en: A medical instrument used by doctors to listen to the sounds inside the body, especially the heart and lungs.
en_example: The doctor listens to your heart with a stethoscope.
zh_example: 醫生可能會用聽診器聽你的心臟。
ja_example: 医者は聴診器で心臓を聞くかもしれません。

en: A written order from a doctor for medicine or treatment.
en_example: The doctor writes a prescription for medicine.

en: A place where medicines are prepared and sold.
en_example: You take the prescription to the pharmacy to get medicine.
zh_example: 你拿這張處方箋去藥局。
ja_example: この処方箋を薬局に持って行きます。

en: To relax and avoid activity in order to recover health or strength.
en_example: The doctor says you need to rest and drink water.
zh_example: 醫生說你需要休息和喝水。
ja_example: 医者は休む必要があると言います。

en: A substance used to treat illness or injury.
en_example: The doctor gives you medicine to help you get better.

en: Pain in the head or upper neck.
en_example: I have a headache when my head hurts.

en: Pain or irritation in the throat.
en_example: I have a sore throat and it hurts to eat.
zh_example: 我喉嚨痛，就像吃東西困難時。
ja_example: 喉が痛くて食べにくいです。

en: A common viral infection causing sneezing, coughing, and a runny nose.
en_example: The doctor said I have a cold because I sneeze a lot.
zh_example: 醫生說我感冒了，因為我一直打噴嚏。
ja_example: 医者は風邪だと言いました。

en: A solemn request for help or expression of thanks addressed to God or another deity.
en_example: When you feel sad, you can talk to God through prayer.
zh_example: 當你感到難過時，你可以透過祈禱與上帝交談。
ja_example: 悲しい時は祈りを通して神に話すことができます。

en_example: Sometimes we feel sad in our heart.
zh_example: 有時我們心裡會感到難過。
ja_example: 時々心が悲しくなります。

en: A feeling of great pleasure and happiness.
en_example: Jesus can bring true and full joy to our heart.
zh_example: 耶穌能帶給我們真實且充滿的喜悅。
ja_example: イエスは私たちの心に真の喜びをもたらします。
